steps.title: Link cause to result
steps.content: The second sentence explains that each Ice Age largely erases geological evidence of the one before it. The third sentence states the result: geologists could not confirm the cyclical theory until the 1960s.

steps.title: Reject nonresult transitions
steps.content: B adds another point but does not show a result. C signals contrast, though the last sentence follows from the evidence problem. D signals sequence, not consequence. The answer is A.
